name: Creamy First-Down Fudge
recipeIngredient: 1 can Eagle Brand Sweetened Evaporated Milk
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Line a 9-inch square pan with aluminum foil.
3. Combine crumbs, sugar, and margarine; press firmly on the bottom of the prepared pan.
4. Bake for 8 minutes. Cool.
5. In a heavy saucepan over low heat, melt Hershey's Chocolate Chips with Eagle brand and vanilla. Remove from heat; stir in cheese until well blended. Stir in nuts. Spread over the prepared crust.
6. Chill for 2 hours or until firm.
7. Lift fudge from the pan onto a cutting board. Peel off foil and cut into squares.
8. Store covered in the refrigerator.
Prep time: 15 minutes.
